div.p: Monitors stock, shipments, shortages, and expiration risk.
Reviews audit evidence and regulatory reports.
Configures adapters and resolves feed failures.
Near-real-time pharmaceutical inventory, integration, shortage/expiry signals, and compliance evidence system.
Shipment, ASN, lot, and inventory feeds.
Facility stock, dispense, and utilization feeds.
VA, SNS, DoD, or state program inventory feeds.
Internal governance teams, auditors, and regulatory reviewers.

g.text: Shares program stock and allocation data [API/File]
Produces evidence packages for authorized review [Secure file/API]
